notes.text: Mobile swipe: left/right only for prev/next. Swipe-down does NOT close. Closing stays tap-overlay or ✕ button only.
Desktop arrows: minimal bare chevrons (‹ ›) in semi-transparent white at left/right edges, matching the existing minimal ✕ close button. No background circle.

Shared component lives at app/components/GalleryGrid.tsx alongside existing app/components/Footer.tsx. Both pages import ../components/GalleryGrid; the two per-page GalleryGrid.tsx copies are deleted.

payload.context: Plan: resolved 3 open questions before finalizing gallery nav plan
